message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All 5 blockers fixed — re-review Step 6">
Luca has fixed all 5 blocking items for Step 6 (commit 24428d1, CI green). Reviewers with blocking items — please re-review:

- Marty: project name now shows on Next Actions page
- Carson: completing action on project detail now reloads page correctly
- Heydon: (a) project-detail-focus.js added, (b) stalled flag contrast fixed to color-fg
- Scott: inline SQL moved to project_repository

If satisfied, send your consensus approval to luca-palmieri.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I had no blocking items in my original review, so no re-review is needed from me. Let me check whether Scott's fix for the inline SQL also addresses my Minor #1 (same issue).

content.text: Good -- the inline SQL from my Minor #1 has been moved to `project_repository::update_project_title()` as part of Scott's blocking fix. That's one of my Minor items resolved.

input.content:
I had no blocking items on my original review, so no re-review needed. I've confirmed that Scott's fix for the inline SQL (now at `project_repository::update_project_title`) also resolves my Minor #1. 

My approval stands. APPROVE -- ready for consensus.
input.summary: No re-review needed, approval stands for consensus

routing.content:
I had no blocking items on my original review, so no re-review needed. I've confirmed that Scott's fix for the inline SQL (now at `project_repository::update_project_title`) also resolves my Minor #1. 

My approval stands. APPROVE -- ready for consensus.

content.text: Approval confirmed at commit `24428d1`. My Minor #1 (inline SQL in service) was fixed as part of Scott's blocking item. The remaining 3 Minor items (service-layer bypass in routes, ContextOption duplication, silently discarded TooLong error) are non-blocking tidy opportunities for a future pass. Waiting for the other reviewers with blocking items to re-review and confirm consensus.
